title: Remote download followed by repeated outbound connections
risk_rationale: Payload staging followed by repeated callbacks on the same entity chain is high-confidence suspicious behavior in the lab telemetry.

attack.rationale: The payload URL is directly observed.
Repeated HTTP callbacks are observed; intent requires investigation.

known_limitations: Process-to-network attribution depends on upstream normalization
No TLS or full process-tree context
Synthetic timestamps do not model timezone changes
